subcodes.first_line: Your book hath been crowned with the diadem of thy Lord's tender care, the All-Compassionate, the All-Merciful. He hath testified to thy turning unto God, thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تکلل کتابک باکلیل ذکر عنایه ربک المشفق الرحیم انه شهد باقبالک الی الله مولی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
